Description.value: Adds an immortal, friendly NPC pet on top of SCore + NPCCore. v0.6 swaps the static-mesh statue Rocky for a Tripo AI auto-rigged 5-legged Rocky with walk + question animations (NLA-baked into the FBX). AvatarController set to AvatarControllerDummy to suppress NPCCore's ArcticFox bone-name animator override; the Prefab carries its own Animator + RockyAnimator.controller. Requires 0-SCore and 0-XNPCCore. Personal use only - not for redistribution.
